Vice President Vance completed his visit to Israel

data.title: Verde Resources Inc.'s BioAsphalt™ surpasses industry standards in recent testing by NCAT. OTQB: VRDR.
data.description: Verde Resources Inc., a road materials company, recently disclosed that their proprietary environmentally sustainable solutions underwent evaluation by the National Center for Asphalt Technology (NCAT). The company, trading as OTCQB: VRDR, stated that the independent laboratory testing by NCAT confirmed the effectiveness of their products. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025, in St. Louis.

data.title: BTQ Technologies and Bonsol Labs achieve industry-first NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptography signature verification on Solana.
data.description: A collaboration between BTQ and Bonsol Labs has resulted in a quantum-proof security solution for the world's quickest trading network. A significant achievement was made as BTQ showcased the initial NIST-standard post-quantum cryptography signature verification on Solana through Bonsol Lab's verifiable computation.

data.title: DXC and Splitit partner to offer installment payments to 300+ million bank account holders, enhancing checkout experience.
data.description: In a joint effort, DXC Technology, a Fortune 500 technology services provider, and Splitit have introduced card-linked installments for bank account holders. This collaboration provides a convenient checkout process and flexibility, while maintaining the trusted branding of banks. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025 in New York and Atlanta. DXC Technology is listed on the NYSE under the symbol DXC.

data.title: Orion gains exclusive commercial license for Abzena's monoclonal antibody targeting high-cancer, announced in San Diego.
data.description: In San Diego on October 23, 2025, Abzena, a top integrated CDMO specializing in complex biologics and bioconjugates, revealed that Orion has secured an exclusive commercial license for one of Abzena's monoclonal antibodies (mAbs) directed towards a high-cancer target. This agreement marks a strategic partnership, with Orion obtaining exclusive commercial rights for the mAb. The specific terms and financial details of the deal were not disclosed publicly. This move signifies a significant advancement in the field of targeted cancer treatments and showcases the continued innovation within the biopharmaceutical industry.
Global Crossing Airlines to hold Q3 conference call on Nov 6, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss financial results.

data.title: FirstService announces Q3 2025 financial results.
data.description: Recent data indicates that the number of COVID-19 cases continues to rise globally, with over 200,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The total number of confirmed cases has now surpassed 10 million, with more than 500,000 deaths worldwide. The surge in cases has led many countries to reimpose lockdown measures and travel restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Experts warn that without sustained efforts to control the pandemic, these numbers are likely to keep increasing in the coming weeks.

data.title: Dundee Corp wins tax appeal against CRA for 2014 tax year; details in Consolidated Financial Statements.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Dundee Corporation (TSX: DC.A) shared its success in appealing disputed reassessments from the Canada Revenue Agency for the 2014 tax year for both the Corporation and its wholly owned subsidiary, Dundee Resources Limited. The Tax Court of Canada ruled in favor of Dundee, with the Department of Justice consenting to judgments on both appeals. Further information on the appeals can be found in Dundee's Consolidated Financial Statements for December 31, 2024.

data.title: After $234M hack, WazirX to resume trading and withdrawals over a year later. New partnership with BitGo; court-approved restructuring in place.
data.description: After court-approved restructuring, the platform is set to resume operations with a gradual rollout plan. Additionally, a new partnership with BitGo for custody services will be implemented.

data.title: ALS care costs in the first year reach over $47,000 for Medicare enrollees due to prescription medication expenses.
data.description: A recent study in Arlington, Va., revealed that prescription medications play a significant role in driving up Medicare costs and patient liabilities. The research conducted on individuals with Medicare showed that medical expenses exceeded $47,000 in the year following an ALS diagnosis. This amount is more than three times the usual expenditure, highlighting the financial burden associated with healthcare for Medicare beneficiaries.

data.title: Tango Therapeutics raises $225m financing from various investors, including Farallon Capital Management and T. Rowe Price.
data.description: Financing has been secured from a variety of institutions including Farallon Capital Management, TCGX, Balyasny Asset Management, Woodline Partners LP, Nextech, Invus, Adage Capital Management LP, Boxer Capital Management, Logos Capital, Nantahala Capital, accounts advised by T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc., and a significant institutional investor.
